name: Michael Mittermeier
bio: Michael Mittermeier is a German comedian regarded as a trailblazer of stand-up comedy in Germany. His 1996 program Zapped became his breakthrough, and he has toured German-language shows across Germany, Austria and Switzerland as well as the English-language show A German on Safari.

timeline.ev: Breakthrough with the comedy program Zapped
Wins the Deutscher Comedypreis for Best Comedian
Performs A German on Safari at the Edinburgh Fringe and abroad

accolades: Multiple Deutscher Comedypreis Best Comedian awards
Over 2.5 million DVD/CD sales across German-speaking Europe

bits.t: A German on Safari: Lonely Planet / Traffic Lights
A German on Safari: Greek Crisis
